text:
I propose the following scalable all-reduce optimization plan:

1. Use NUMA-aware data partitioning to minimize cache misses and overlap communication with compute.
2. Use NUMA-aware tiling to minimize cache blocking and overlap communication with compute.
3. Use a combination of shared memory and cache for efficient
